name: axctl
title: Axis Camera Control
description: Manage Axis cameras — discover, snapshot, info, streaming
author: matthewvisher

commands.name: list-cameras
commands.title: List Cameras
commands.subtitle: Axis Cameras
commands.description: List all known Axis cameras from the device registry

commands.name: discover
commands.title: Discover Cameras
commands.subtitle: Axis Cameras
commands.description: Scan the local network for Axis cameras

commands.name: snapshot
commands.title: Capture Snapshot
commands.subtitle: Axis Cameras
commands.description: Capture a JPEG snapshot from a camera

commands.name: open-stream
commands.title: Open Live Stream
commands.subtitle: Axis Cameras
commands.description: Open a camera's live video stream in the browser
